items.title_en: Jim Cramer says the market powered through a tough earnings week but 'that doesn't mean we're out of the woods yet'
items.title_zh: 吉姆·克莱默表示，市场在艰难的财报周中表现强劲，但这并不意味着我们已经走出困境。
items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer looks to the jam-packed earnings week ahead and explains what he's looking for.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 展望了未来一周的财报，并解释了他的目标。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
items.title_zh: 因特朗普与默茨发生争执，美国拟将驻德美军削减5000人
items.desc_en: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.
items.desc_zh: 减少美国在德国部署的决定是在这两个盟友因伊朗问题发生争执之际作出的。

items.title_en: Who shot a Secret Service officer at the Trump press dinner?
items.title_zh: 谁在特朗普新闻晚宴上枪杀了特勤局官员？
items.desc_en: Court papers do not explicitly accuse the suspect of shooting the officer, even as officials say it was not "friendly fire".
items.desc_zh: 法庭文件没有明确指控嫌疑人开枪射击这名警官，尽管官员们表示这不是“友军开火”。

items.title_en: Cautious optimism: Berkshire investors weigh future under new CEO Greg Abel

items.desc_en: The mood in the air was cautiously optimistic as new and returning investors weighed the company's direction under a new chief executive.
items.desc_zh: 随着新投资者和回归投资者权衡新任首席执行官领导下的公司发展方向，空气中弥漫着谨慎乐观的情绪。

items.title_en: Turkish police arrest more than 500 people at May Day rallies
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方在五一集会上逮捕了500多人

items.title_zh: 以色列拦截加沙援助船队后释放希腊境内除两名活动人士外的所有活动人士
items.desc_en: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
items.desc_zh: 全球苏姆德船队谴责这次拦截是“海盗行为”，而以色列外交部则称该船队是“公关噱头”。

items.title_en: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla - BBC
items.title_zh: 以色列在拦截加沙援助船队后释放了除两名希腊活动人士外的所有人员 - BBC
items.desc_en: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla  BBCGaza aid flotilla activists taken to Crete after Israeli interception  ReutersIsraeli authorities taking 2 acti
items.desc_zh: 以色列拦截加沙援助船队后，以色列释放了除两名希腊活动人士外的所有活动人士 BBCGaza 援助船队活动人士在以色列拦截后被带到克里特岛 路透社以色列当局采取了 2 项行动

items.title_en: Engine trouble ahead? How the Strait of Hormuz standoff threatens luxury auto giants
items.title_zh: 前面的发动机有问题吗？霍尔木兹海峡对峙如何威胁豪华汽车巨头
items.desc_en: Supercar engines rely on base oils because they can withstand extreme heat, high revs and intense pressure.
items.desc_zh: 超级跑车发动机依赖基础油，因为它们可以承受极热、高转速和高压。

items.title_en: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.title_zh: 化肥老板表示，伊朗战争导致数十亿粮食面临风险
items.desc_en: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
items.desc_zh: 雅拉公司的老板表示，伊朗冲突造成的化肥短缺可能会降低农作物产量并推高价格。

items.title_en: Myanmar attempts to rehabilitate image with Suu Kyi move - NPR
items.title_zh: 缅甸试图通过昂山素季的举动重塑形象 - NPR
items.desc_en: Myanmar attempts to rehabilitate image with Suu Kyi move  NPRMyanmar’s Junta Claims ‘Benevolence’ for Aung San Suu Kyi. It Still Rules Cruelly.  The New York TimesAung San Suu Kyi: The Myanmar democra
items.desc_zh: 缅甸试图通过昂山素季的举动来恢复形象 NPRMyanmar 军政府声称对昂山素季有“仁慈”。它仍然残酷地统治着。  纽约时报昂山素季：缅甸民主

items.title_en: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
items.title_zh: 巴西国会批准大幅缩短博尔索纳罗刑期的计划
items.desc_en: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
items.desc_zh: 去年，前总统雅伊尔·博尔索纳罗因在选举失败后策划政变而被判处 27 年监禁。

items.title_en: British couple jailed in Iran: 'We're likely to be here for a long time'
items.title_zh: 英国夫妇在伊朗被监禁：“我们可能会在这里待很长时间”
items.desc_en: Lindsay and Craig Foreman are facing the reality of a 10-year prison sentence following their arrest in Iran while on a motorcycle tour last year.
items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 去年在伊朗骑摩托车旅行时被捕，目前面临 10 年监禁的现实。

items.title_en: Oscar goes missing after Academy Award winner is blocked from taking it on flight
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡奖得主被禁止携带奥斯卡登机后失踪
items.desc_en: The airline said it regrets the situation and was doing an urgent "comprehensive internal search" for the award.
items.desc_zh: 该航空公司表示对这种情况感到遗憾，并正在为该奖项进行紧急“全面内部搜索”。
